title: Add options to Desktop App to "Start automatically"
excerpt: Add options to allow the Desktop App to start when a user logs in to windows… i.e. Microsoft Teams has a “Auto-start application” checkbox.

posts.author: ITBill (Bill Moller)
posts.cookedHtml: Add options to allow the Desktop App to start when a user logs in to windows… i.e. Microsoft Teams has a “Auto-start application” checkbox.

posts.author: alexkerr (Alex Kerr)
posts.cookedHtml: Here you go - Add an app to run automatically at startup in Windows 10 - Microsoft Support
